name: yahoo finance

meta.description: Stocks, crypto, commodities, forex, bonds, indices, ETFs, options, fundamentals, holders, insider trades

specs.name: compare_tickers
specs.description: Compare any tickers side by side. tickers = comma separated e.g. 'AAPL,MSFT,GOOGL'

specs.name: get_all_commodities
specs.description: Get live prices for all major commodities: metals, energy, agriculture.

specs.name: get_analyst_data
specs.description: Get analyst recommendations, price targets, upgrades and downgrades.

specs.name: get_balance_sheet
specs.description: Get annual balance sheet: assets, liabilities, equity, cash, debt.

specs.name: get_bonds
specs.description: Get live US Treasury bond yields: 3M, 5Y, 10Y, 30Y.

specs.name: get_cash_flow
specs.description: Get annual cash flow: operating, investing, financing, free cash flow.

specs.name: get_crypto_info
specs.description:
Get full crypto data via Yahoo Finance.
symbol: BTC-USD, ETH-USD, SOL-USD, BNB-USD, XRP-USD, ADA-USD, DOGE-USD

specs.name: get_dividends
specs.description: Get full dividend payment history.

specs.name: get_earnings
specs.description: Get earnings history and upcoming earnings dates with EPS estimates.

specs.name: get_etf_info
specs.description: Get ETF details: expense ratio, NAV, returns, category. e.g. SPY, QQQ, VTI

specs.name: get_forex_rates
specs.description:
Get live forex rates. pairs = comma separated
e.g. 'EURUSD=X,GBPUSD=X,USDJPY=X,USDCAD=X,AUDUSD=X,USDCHF=X'

specs.name: get_holders
specs.description: Get institutional and mutual fund holders.

specs.name: get_income_statement
specs.description: Get annual income statement: revenue, gross profit, net income, EBITDA.

specs.name: get_insider_transactions
specs.description: Get recent insider buying and selling transactions.

specs.name: get_market_indices
specs.description: Get live prices for all major global market indices.

specs.name: get_options
specs.description: Get options chain: calls and puts with strike, price, IV, open interest.

specs.name: get_price
specs.description:
Get real-time price for ANY ticker.
Stocks: AAPL, TSLA, NVDA | Crypto: BTC-USD, ETH-USD
Commodities: GC=F (Gold), CL=F (Oil), SI=F (Silver), NG=F (Gas)
Forex: EURUSD=X, GBPUSD=X | Indices: ^GSPC, ^IXIC, ^DJI, ^VIX
Bonds: ^TNX (10Y), ^TYX (30Y) | ETFs: SPY, QQQ, VTI

specs.name: get_price_history
specs.description:
Get OHLCV price history for any ticker.
period: 1d, 5d, 1mo, 3mo, 6mo, 1y, 2y, 5y, 10y, ytd, max

specs.name: get_splits
specs.description: Get full stock split history.

specs.name: get_stock_fundamentals
specs.description: Get full fundamentals: PE, EPS, margins, growth, dividends, analyst targets, beta.

specs.name: get_stock_news
specs.description: Get latest news headlines for a ticker.
